root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_account_constant.cash_account_code ,'!op_date_1!' as start_date ,'!op_date_2!' as end_date ,pka_acc_journal.fp_cash_balance('!op_date_1!'::date - 1 ,'01') as balance_forward FROM sc_acc_m_account_constant where 1 = 1

r_port_acc_cash_nest.sql:
select journal_date , journal_tdate, dr_amount , cr_amount , balancegl_branch from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date as journal_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as journal_tdate, sum( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount ) as dr_amount , sum( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount ) as cr_amount , pka_acc_journal.fp_cash_balance(journal_date::date,'01') as balancegl_branch FROM sc_acc_m_general_ledger, sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_acc_m_account_constant WHERE ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date between {0} and {1} ) AND ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_constant.cash_account_code ) ) GROUP BY sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date
union
SELECT sc_fin_journal_head.journal_date as journal_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_fin_journal_head.journal_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as journal_tdate, 0 as dr_amount , 0 as cr_amount , pka_acc_journal.fp_cash_balance(journal_date::date,'01') as balancegl_branch FROM sc_fin_journal_head WHERE journal_date between {0} and {1} AND main_counter = '1' and total_receive = 0 and total_payment = 0 ) order by journal_date
